2180.name: Within the Mausoleum
2180.description: You find yourself standing within a large central chamber with a high, domed ceiling. Stained glass windows high above cast a warm, colorful light throughout the room. Intricate carvings and paintings decorate the stately marble, depicting legendary figures and moments from the world's history. Five small rooms break off from the main chamber through an elegant stone archway, decorated with a sigil.

2181.name: The Hall of Gods
2181.description: You find yourself in a large chamber, with a high, domed ceiling that reaches towards the heavens. The walls are adorned with gleaming gold panels, and the floor is made of shining marble tiles inlaid with intricate patterns. The room is lit by a large, golden sun set into the ceiling, which glows with a magical light. Along the walls, there are magnificent statues of the gods, each one individually crafted and detailed, depicting the gods in their full majesty. The Hall of Gods. (1/1)

2182.name: The Hall of Forgers
2182.description: The Hall of Forgers is a dimly lit room filled with the glow of silver light. The walls are lined with shelves and displays, showcasing ancient tomes and intricate tools. The air is thick with the scent of metal and smoke, as if the forge itself is just around the corner. Detailed carvings decorate the walls, showcasing each Forger and depicting their contributions. The sound of hammers ringing and fires crackling fills the air, making it feel like the forgers are still hard at work, even in death. The Hall of Forgers. (1/1)

2183.name: The Hall of Eternals
2183.description: The Hall of Eternals is a grand room with high, arched ceilings and polished marble flooring. The walls are lined with shelves and glass cases, displaying the works of the Eternals who helped shape the world. Each case is illuminated by a soft, golden light, casting a warm glow throughout the room. The Hall of Eternals. (1/1)

2184.name: The Hall of Artisans
2184.description: The Hall of Artisans is a magnificent room, filled with the beauty and creativity of its honored members. The walls of the room are lined with intricate murals and frescoes, depicting scenes of artisans at work, crafting their masterpieces. Plaques and inscriptions mounted around the room bear the names of the honored artisans and the works they are best known for. The room is lit by warm, golden light, filtering in through stained glass windows that depict scenes of art and creation. The Hall of Artisans. (1/1)

2185.name: The Hall of Immortals
2185.description: Within the Hall of Immortals, you see a long, dimly lit room, lined with shelves and display cases filled with various artifacts and memorabilia representing the work of the immortals. A single, large blue candle burns brightly in the center of the room, illuminating the surrounding displays and casting a warm, flickering light over the entire space. The Hall of Immortals. (1/1)
